site.title: Rack Cards & Postcards | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Rack cards, postcards, and custom card printing in Simcoe County, GTA & Muskoka. Ideal for handouts, mailers, and promotions!

hero.title: Rack & Postcards
hero.imageAlt: Professional rack card and postcard printing

centreText.title: Smart, compact marketing
centreText.description: Printed on sturdy card stock, postcards and rack cards are designed to deliver your message efficiently and clearly! They pack a ton of helpful information without taking up a lot of space … or your budget!

features.title: Rack cards for high-impact info.
features.description:
Rack cards are two-sided, easy-to-read pieces often displayed in stands, counters, or reception areas. They're ideal for sharing key information in a clean, organized format.

Choose from gloss or matte finishes — perfect for:

  • Tourism & local attractions
  • Service overviews
  • Menus or price lists
  • Community programs or trade shows
  • In-store or front-desk displays

features.title: Postcards for mail, handouts & promotions.
features.description:
Postcards are one of the most efficient ways to promote, inform, or follow up with customers. Whether mailed directly or handed out, they deliver your message loud and clear — commonly used for:

  • Direct mail campaigns
  • Promotions & special offers
  • Event announcements
  • Thank-you or follow-up cards

Simple, cost-effective, and easy to distribute, they continue to be a go-to, effective marketing tool!

features.title: Additional card stock prints.
features.description:
For any durable, print items that need to look polished and hold up over time, talk to us! Each piece is designed to be practical, professional, and aligned with your brand.

  • Appointment cards
  • Loyalty or punch cards
  • Save-the-date cards
  • Announcement cards
  • Event printing & more

cta.heading: Need help with layout? Check out our Graphic Design Services.
